creative_proposition: The film speaks through exhaustion. Dialogue is redirected through exhaustion.
candidate_generation: Planned emotion strategy. Candidate pools exclude unusable zero-duration material.
selection_rules: Selection is deterministic for identical inputs, parameters, and random seed.
transformation_behavior: The film speaks through exhaustion. Dialogue is redirected through exhaustion.
progression: Transformation strength is constant unless an explicit intensity parameter selects fewer windows.
controlled_uncertainty: No runtime uncertainty is permitted before contract acceptance.

hard_invariants.statement: The operator must remain unavailable until this contract is accepted.

validation.strategy: Contract review must resolve every blocker before executable validation is defined.

failure_behavior: Remain visible as unavailable and report the named contract blockers.
preview_strategy: No executable preview is available before contract acceptance.
renderer_requirements: Preserve the source picture unless the contract explicitly says otherwise.
Produce a final MP4 with a verified audio stream.
Report replacement-audio provenance, dialogue coverage, silence ratio, and invariant results.

procedure_behavior.commitment: When a Procedure runtime exists, consume prior mappings without losing immutable source provenance; this phase does not execute that commitment.

blockers: Define approved performance and DSP changes without degrading intelligibility.
